task: Make the home screen support dark mode. Update the home screen colors and backgrounds to use semantic colors that adapt to light/dark appearance. This is an iOS-only change.

delegations.description:
Research the iOS home screen implementation to understand:

1. Find the home screen files - look in `amp-ios/Modules/` for anything related to "Home", "HomeScreen", "HomeView", "Dashboard", or similar. Check directory names and file names.
2. Identify all color definitions used on the home screen -
